caption: Late nights on campus have a different kind of magic. Just finished a lecture when the library power flickered, leaving me and the quiet student alone in the dark. My fitted skirt and blouse hid my secrets perfectly, but the friction of the moment made everything else feel visible. I leaned in close, letting the whispers of pages turn into something more intimate. Who knew grading papers could lead to this? 📚🔥 #ProfessorVibes #CampusSecrets #LateNightStudy
